title: 5 Manual Processes Costing Your Construction Company 10+ Hours a Week
subtitle: Self-audit to spot where your team is bleeding time and prioritize what to fix first

sections.title: Document Signing and Certification
sections.description: Manual page-by-page signing on SWPPPs, invoices, and debit notes is a compliance risk on top of a time sink.

items.text: Audit whether someone manually signs each PDF page individually with e-sign, clicks, and password entry
items.tip: Watch your signer work for 10 minutes and count the clicks per document

items.text: Count documents requiring multi-page signatures per day and flag if the total exceeds 10
items.tip: Include invoices, certifications, and debit notes in the count

items.text: Check recent signed documents for skipped pages or missed signature fields
items.tip: Pull 20 random completed files and spot-check every page

items.text: Deploy a folder-triggered workflow that auto-signs designated pages and returns a batch summary for single approval
items.tip: One approval replaces 200 clicks per session

sections.title: Job Order and Project Data Entry
sections.description: Re-typing the same project data across PM tools, Trello cards, and bid docs burns hours per job.

items.text: Map every system where new-job data (address, scope, client, area) gets manually re-typed
items.tip: Draw the flow on paper, count the touchpoints

items.text: Build one intake form that pushes job data to every downstream tool automatically
items.tip: Use webhooks to sync to Trello, PM tool, and bid templates simultaneously

items.text: Define required fields once so every system pulls from the same schema
items.tip: Lock the field list with your ops manager before building automation

sections.title: Estimating and Bid Preparation
sections.description: Spreadsheet-driven bids with manual markup calculations slow response time and introduce errors.

items.text: Build a reusable bid template library keyed by project type and scope
items.tip: Start with your 3 most common job types

items.text: Automate labor, material, and markup calculations from a single input sheet
items.tip: Protect formula cells so field staff cannot overwrite them

items.text: Track time from RFP received to bid delivered and set a target under 48 hours
items.tip: Faster bids win more jobs at better margins

sections.title: Daily Field Reports and Progress Updates
sections.description: Foremen texting photos and updates to office staff who re-type them into reports is pure waste.

items.text: Deploy a mobile form for foremen to submit daily reports with photos directly from the field
items.tip: Voice-to-text fields remove typing friction for crews

items.text: Generate client-ready PDF daily reports automatically from submitted field data
items.tip: Schedule delivery to clients at 6pm each workday

items.text: Centralize progress photos and notes in one dashboard searchable by job and date
items.tip: Eliminates the 'find that photo from last Tuesday' scramble

sections.title: Invoicing and Collections Follow-Up
sections.description: Manual invoice creation and payment chasing costs billable hours and delays cash flow.

items.text: Trigger invoice drafts automatically when project milestones hit completed status
items.tip: Connect PM tool completion events to your accounting system

items.text: Schedule automated payment reminders at 7, 14, and 30 days past due
items.tip: Include a one-click payment link in every reminder

items.text: Review an automated weekly aging report every Monday with your bookkeeper
items.tip: Flag anything over 45 days for a personal call

completion_cta.headline: You Found the Leaks. Now Plug Them.
completion_cta.description: Take the section with the most checked boxes and book a 30-minute automation audit. We will map the exact workflow, estimate hours saved, and scope a fix you can deploy in under 30 days.
